nasb.text: Then I turned to see the voice that was speaking with me. And having turned I saw seven golden lampstands;

esv.text: Then I turned to see the voice that was speaking to me, and on turning I saw seven golden lampstands,

cnv.text: 我轉過身來要看看那跟我說話的聲音是誰發的；一轉過來，就看見七個金燈臺。

ccb.text: 我转身看究竟是谁在对我说话，我看见七个金灯台，

csbs.text: 我转过身，要看看谁的声音对我说话。我转过身就看见了七座金灯台。
